intro: Four simple steps from craving to kitchen table.

steps.title: Browse Our Menu
steps.description: Pick your favorites from our breads, pies, cookies, and seasonal specials.

steps.title: Submit Your Order
steps.description: Fill out the form below with what you’d like and when you need it.

steps.title: Receive Confirmation
steps.description: We’ll email you within 24 hours to confirm your order and total.

steps.title: Pick Up or Get Delivery
steps.description: Collect your freshly baked goodies or we’ll arrange local delivery.

notice: All orders require 48–72 hours notice. We'll confirm availability and your total by email, then collect payment (cash or Venmo) at pickup or delivery.
